title: calycobolus breviflorus
intro: Calycobolus breviflorus is a plant species in the family Convolvulaceae, commonly known as the short-flowered calycobolus or calycobolus breviflorus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of calycobolus breviflorus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of calycobolus breviflorus can be made by drying the leaves and roots, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
